description.en: Fetches the Eurostat/GISCO 1 km population census grid for the given countries directly from the GISCO web service, builds 1 km x 1 km grid cell polygons (EPSG:3035) from the cell corner coordinates, and validates the resulting geometries (R function 'get_census_grid')

inputFile1_countries_rds.title: Countries for catchment
inputFile1_countries_rds.description: Path to an .rds file containing the list of country codes (matching GISCO's CNTR_ID values) for which to fetch the census grid.

censusgrid.title: Eurostat census grid
censusgrid.description: The Eurostat/GISCO 1 km population census grid, filtered to the requested countries, with validated polygon geometries in EPSG:3035.
